input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.3.1
            TITLE: the design briefing must use the template from the fsae online website.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.3.1: The Design Briefing must use the template from the FSAE Online website.
S.4.3.1 The Design Briefing must use the template from the FSAE Online website.

final_answer: The Design Briefing must use the template from the FSAE Online website.
